title: Your workspace loads from the local cache again — no waiting for sync
summary: Fixed a regression where a reload race could drop the local database into memory-only mode, so the app appeared empty until it re-synced from the hub; it now retries and stays on persistent storage.
highlights: OPFS storage no longer silently falls back to in-memory on a reload race
Returning users see their data immediately from the local cache, before the hub connects
